grid_resolution_1deg.role: harmonised analysis grid (~30 km per degree at the equator)
grid_resolution_1deg.selection: computational/harmonisation choice; not optimised against the target

binary_thresholds_5_10nT.selection: researcher-chosen in the repository-local plan; not externally registered
binary_thresholds_5_10nT.sensitivity: both thresholds reported; continuous-field analysis is now mandatory

tio2_buffers_25_50_100km.role: neighbourhood means for a postulated lateral surface proxy
tio2_buffers_25_50_100km.selection: researcher-chosen scales; no claim that Nichols et al. specified them
tio2_buffers_25_50_100km.sensitivity: family is ablated together; individual-scale interpretation is exploratory

gravity_bandpass_600_40km.sensitivity: excluded from the TiO2 proxy and never used to define support

antipode_length_300km.selection: researcher-chosen validation/power-simulation scale, not an inferred lunar length
antipode_length_300km.sensitivity: does not enter the observed real-data antipode-distance feature

cv_blocks_30deg.sensitivity: 15/20/30/45/60-degree results are reported as non-monotone partition sensitivity

primary_age_mask_imbrian.selection: researcher-chosen temporal proxy; not source-rock dating
primary_age_mask_imbrian.sensitivity: Imbrian+Nectarian and unmasked cells are also reported

injection_power_grid.role: conditional sensitivity curve for the impact-antipode diagnostic control
injection_power_grid.selection: standardised latent coefficients 0--4; no coefficient is asserted to be a physical target effect
injection_power_grid.sensitivity: 30 Monte Carlo fields per strength, 30-degree primary folds, and a 60-degree robustness check

continuous_ridge_alpha.role: regularization for the transparent continuous-field descriptive model
continuous_ridge_alpha.selection: fixed analyst choice of 1.0; not tuned against held-out outcomes
continuous_ridge_alpha.sensitivity: coefficients and blocked score increments are descriptive, not an inferential endpoint

minimum_effective_regions_8.role: post-hoc fail-closed adequacy threshold for strong positive or negative labels
minimum_effective_regions_8.selection: analyst-chosen heuristic; not established by lunar physics or external registration
minimum_effective_regions_8.sensitivity: the observed estimate is approximately 1, so reasonable alternatives do not change the current status

minimum_detection_power_0_80.role: post-hoc minimum power for an adequacy claim at a declared target effect
minimum_detection_power_0_80.selection: conventional analyst choice; the target effect remains undeclared
minimum_detection_power_0_80.sensitivity: reported separately from point-estimate and Wilson-lower-bound power

low_event_prevalence_0_02.role: descriptive underpowered-warning threshold only; it does not determine inference status
low_event_prevalence_0_02.sensitivity: the exact prevalence and positive count are always reported

Method_Roles.transparent_continuous_regression: descriptive complement with no binding headline
Method_Roles.threshold_classifier_default_xgb: binding estimator for observed scores, spatial nulls, ablation, and decision criteria
Method_Roles.nested_tuned_xgb: descriptive tuning diagnostic only; not used for criteria
Method_Roles.xgboost_shap: exploratory interpretation of the binding default-config model; not a substitute for independent regions
Method_Roles.injection_recovery: conditional design-sensitivity analysis; not evidence about the Moon

Transparent_Continuous_Analysis.estimand: held-out prediction of log1p(surface magnetic-field magnitude in nT)
Transparent_Continuous_Analysis.inference_note: Fold scores and coefficients are descriptive; no row-level p-value is valid when the effective number of independent spatial regions is small.

mask.source: USGS Unified Geologic Map of the Moon 1:5M GIS v2, GeoUnits
mask.selection_rule: exact FIRST_Unit membership in {Em, Im1, Im2, Imd}
limitations: USGS 1:5M geologic units are a generalized surface-geology proxy, not the formal pixel-level validity domain published for the LROC WAC calibration.
Exact mare-unit polygons conservatively exclude mapped superposed crater, ejecta, plains, and dark-mantling units even where they occur inside a mare.
Map-unit boundaries and their rasterization are resolution dependent; edge pixels can be classification mixtures.
The row-local geology proxy restricts this sensitivity to raw TiO2 only; it does not establish formal WAC validity or support for buffered TiO2 features.

design.interpretation: sensitivity analysis of present-day surface TiO2 spatial co-location; not a test of intermittent-dynamo timing

mare_minus_full.interpretation: Descriptive scope contrast on common inherited folds; the scopes have different rows and prevalence, so this is not a paired causal effect.

full_scope_continuous_raw_tio2.estimand: held-out prediction of log1p(surface magnetic-field magnitude in nT)
full_scope_continuous_raw_tio2.inference_note: Fold scores and coefficients are descriptive; no row-level p-value is valid when the effective number of independent spatial regions is small.
full_scope_continuous_raw_tio2.terrain_scope: full age-restricted scope; raw row-local TiO2 comparator

mare_valid_continuous.estimand: held-out prediction of log1p(surface magnetic-field magnitude in nT)
mare_valid_continuous.inference_note: Fold scores and coefficients are descriptive; no row-level p-value is valid when the effective number of independent spatial regions is small.
mare_valid_continuous.terrain_scope: USGS mare-proxy mask; raw row-local TiO2 only

mare_minus_full_continuous.interpretation: Descriptive common-fold scope contrast; the mare and full scopes contain different rows, so this is not a paired causal effect.

mare_valid_spatial_structure.inference_note: Descriptive mare-scope structure diagnostic; it does not supply a terrain-specific rotation null or full-decision power calibration.

Permutation_Test.statistic_label: mean PR-AUC across the observed number of evaluable spatial folds

impact_antipode_benchmark.role: Literature-motivated positive-control benchmark; the simple global distance feature is not assumed to encode every antipodal process.

spatial_rotation_null.statistic_label: mean PR-AUC across the observed number of evaluable spatial folds

impact_antipode_benchmark.interpretation: Failure to recover this benchmark prevents strong negative inference about the surface-TiO2 proxy.

estimand.strength_unit: standard deviations of latent magnetic nuisance field added per one-SD increase in the fixed control score

noise.preserves: two-dimensional amplitude spectrum of log1p(observed magnetic field) approximately, after missing-cell fill

design.primary_detection_rule: paired one-sided with-control > ablated PR-AUC at alpha, with positive mean drop
design.spatially_robust_rule: primary detection and positive mean ablation drop at the largest block

structural_diagnostics.distinction: Geometric CV blocks are non-overlapping holdouts, but they are not automatically independent observations. The variogram-area estimate describes effective information.

minimum_detectable_effect.interpretation: The MDE is larger than the tested grid or is not identifiable with this design.

Detection_Power.qualification: Recovery means at least one tested injected strength reached point-estimate target power; adequacy additionally requires a declared target effect, its lower confidence bound, and sufficient effective spatial information.

limitations: Injection recovery validates sensitivity to the encoded spatial feature; it does not prove the real association exists.
Strength is a standardised latent coefficient, not a lunar-physics parameter or an odds ratio.
The result is conditional on this map, mask, prevalence, feature support, model, and fold geometry.
The tested-grid MDE is not interpolated; Monte Carlo uncertainty is reported with every power estimate.
Phase surrogates preserve the observed spectrum approximately after filling unmapped cells; rotation surrogates are dependent placements.
This direct control-ablation power is not power for every conjunctive H1 publication criterion (permutation and SHAP ranking are not resimulated).
Non-overlapping CV blocks prevent row leakage but cannot create independent lunar regions when the correlation range exceeds the blocks.

Detection_Power.qualification: Recovery means at least one tested injected strength reached point-estimate target power; adequacy additionally requires a declared target effect, its lower confidence bound, and sufficient effective spatial information.

minimum_detectable_effect.interpretation: The MDE is larger than the tested grid or is not identifiable with this design.

Detection_Power.interpretation: The injected curve quantifies a design-conditional detection floor. No externally justified target effect was declared, and the observed impact-antipode benchmark must also clear its own spatial null.

block_bootstrap_pr_auc.limitation: Conditional block-resampling interval only; selected blocks are smaller than the estimated spatial range and/or too few effective regions exist.

Spatial_Diagnostics.block_size_interpretation: Non-monotone partition sensitivity; block size is not treated as a one-dimensional leakage meter.
